peirce_classification.firstness: Threatening emails sent from anonymous service with Gmail cookies exposed in HTTP traffic
peirce_classification.secondness: pcap analysis correlates internal IP 192.168.15.4 with Johnny Coach's jcoach@gmail.com account
peirce_classification.thirdness: Johnny Coach, a Chemistry 109 student, sent harassment emails to the professor using anonymous services and Gmail, identified through network traffic analysis

null_hypothesis: The password-less WiFi network means anyone could have used the connection and Johnny Coach's email
scoring_notes: Nitroba. Strongest scoring case in set. All three pcap hashes confirmed matching live source. Use for precision/recall benchmark.
